environment: preview container, admin session (Ava Bennett), viewport 1920x900, no throttling

runs.wall_clock_ms: invalid (negative delta due to SPA navigation)
invalid (negative delta due to SPA navigation)

notes: Client-side routing keeps a single navigation entry; wall-clock deltas for subsequent SPA transitions do not reflect a true fresh load. Use nav_timing responseEnd as the authoritative measure for HTML response, and rely on the Playwright waitForSelector timestamp for meaningful content ready.

First iteration is a cold navigation (11.8 s wall-clock). This includes preview-container warm-up, dev-server compile, and bundle download. Subsequent iterations execute in the same tab and the HTML response completes in ~45 ms with DOM ready in ~285-427 ms.
domContentLoadedEventEnd of 285-427 ms measures the shell parse + hydrate time; the API-driven Clinical content mounts after the initial hydrate.

reason: Time budget prioritised medium chart + rollback + screenshot evidence. Small chart is bounded by the same DOM-ready + API-timing envelope observed for the medium chart; measured value likely lower.
recommended_action: Repeat the same measurement script against Aria Johnson / Hannah Whitaker (see /app/memory/DEMO_SEED.md) before pilot.

reason: Riverbend demo tops out at ~30 events. No 200+ event patient exists.
blocking_actions: Create scripts/seed_large_chart.py (backend) to generate a synthetic 250-event chart on a tenant-scoped test patient with no PHI.
Re-run the measurement script against the synthetic chart.
Compare against proposed thresholds in PHASE3_PERFORMANCE_TEST_PLAN.md.

reason: Optional; not required unless P95 on the large chart exceeds proposed threshold.

system_notes.backend_dev_reload: uvicorn --reload — includes warm compile overhead that inflates first-run measurements
